nasb.text: But they were insistent, with loud voices asking that He be crucified. And their voices began to prevail.

esv.text: But they were urgent, demanding with loud cries that he should be crucified. And their voices prevailed.

cnv.text: 但他們大聲吵鬧，要他把耶穌釘十字架，他們的聲音就得了勝。

ccb.text: 众人却继续大声喊叫，执意要求把耶稣钉在十字架上。最后，他们的声势占了上风。

csbs.text: 他们催逼彼拉多，大声要求把耶稣钉上十字架，他们的喊声终于得胜了。
